title: Tekba
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{Character |type=New Republic |image=[[File:Captain_tekba.jpg]] |name=Tekba |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]], ''[[Pelagia]]'', [[Braxant Run/Legends|Braxant Run]]''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the events of [[Empire's End 1|''Empire's End'' 1]], in which [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] Tekba [[Death/Legends|dies]] aboard the [[Troop transport/Legends|troopship]] ''[[Pelagia]]'', to [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]]. Moreover, ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' dates the destruction of the ''Pelagia'' to 10 years after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' places the event in the [[Braxant Run/Legends|Braxant Run]]. |species=[[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]][[Empire's End 1|''Empire's End'' 1]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]][[Empire's End (audio drama)|''Empire's End'' audio drama]] |pronouns= |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes=[[Color/Legends|Black]] |skin=Dark |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] **[[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|I'm ''telling'' you, Captain Tekba, this is the ''same'' kind of missile that destroyed ''Pinnacle Base!'' It has ''full shields'' and is ''armed'' to fend off attacks. You have about ''ten minutes'' to jump to hyperspace!|General Lando Calrissian warns Captain Tekba of the Galaxy Gun's attack|}} [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] '''Tekba''' was a [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who [[Commanding officer/Legends|commanded]] the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Troop transport/Legends|troopship]] ''[[Pelagia]]'' during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. In [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]], while the ''Pelagia'' was en route to reinforce a New Republic [[Siege of an Imperial Galactic Rim shipyard|siege]] of an [[Unidentified Imperial shipyard|Imperial shipyard]] on the [[Galactic Rim/Legends|Galactic Rim]], it stopped to pick up an [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing fighter]] [[Green Squadron (New Republic)|flight group]] in the [[Ottega system/Legends|Ottega system]]. At that moment, a [[particle disintegrator warhead]] was fired at Tekba's [[Starship/Legends|starship]] from the [[Galaxy Gun]], [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] newest [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]]. Although [[General/Legends|General]] [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] warned Tekba of the [[Missile/Legends|missile]], which was approaching the ''Pelagia'' through [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]], Tekba did not have enough [[Time/Legends|time]] to retreat and instead attempted to intercept and destroy the [[Warhead/Legends|warhead]]. However, the effort failed, and the missile [[Destruction of the Pelagia|destroyed the ''Pelagia'']], [[Death/Legends|killing]] Tekba and a hundred thousand of the New Republic's best [[Troop/Legends|troops]] that it had been carrying aboard. ==Biography== ===New Republic service=== {{Quote|This is Captain Tekba, go ahead Alliance Command.|Captain Tekba, receiving a communication|}} Tekba was a [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served in the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] [[New Republic Defense Fleet|naval forces]] during the later stages of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. By [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]], Tekba had attained the [[Military rank/Legends|rank]] of [[Captain/Legends|captain]] and was in [[Commanding officer/Legends|command]] of the [[Troop transport/Legends|troopship]] ''[[Pelagia]]''. During that [[Time/Legends|time]], the New Republic was caving in under the [[Operation Shadow Hand|onslaught]] of the [[Transfer essence|reborn]] [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Galactic Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], who used his newest [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]], the [[Galaxy Gun]], to spread a [[Dark Empire|reign of terror]] across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. [[File:BattlestarPelagia-EE1.png|thumb|right|250px|Troopship ''Pelagia'', the starship under Tekba's command]] The Galaxy Gun was capable of firing [[particle disintegrator warhead]]s that traveled through [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] and could destroy entire celestial bodies, as was the [[Destruction of Da Soocha V|case]] with the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Da Soocha V]], where the New Republic had operated its [[Pinnacle Base]],[[Dark Empire II 5|''Dark Empire II'' 5]] as well as two other targets. Sometime after the destruction of Pinnacle Base, Tekba and the ''Pelagia'' were assigned to reinforce a New Republic [[Siege of an Imperial Galactic Rim shipyard|siege]] of an [[Unidentified Imperial shipyard|Imperial shipyard]] that was taking place on the [[Galactic Rim/Legends|Galactic Rim]]. Loaded to its brink with a hundred thousand of the New Republic's finest ground [[Troop/Legends|troops]] and heavy [[Armor/Legends|armor]], the ''Pelagia'' embarked on a journey toward the [[Shipyard/Legends|shipyard]]. ===Doomsday weapon strikes again=== {{Quote|What? Impossible! Our fire doesn't penetrate those shields! Let's hope your shields are as good, Captain Tekba!''"
"''Take evasive action! Take evas…|Green Leader and Captain Tekba, moments before the destruction of the ''Pelagia''|}} On the way, however, the ''Pelagia'' made a stop somewhere along the [[Braxant Run/Legends|Braxant Run]] [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]], in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim's]] [[Weneen sector/Legends|Weneen sector]],{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} to rendezvous with [[Green Squadron (New Republic)|Green Group]], a [[Squadron/Legends|flight group]] of [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighters]]{{DB|starship|xwing|X-wing starfighter}} identifies [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing starfighters]] used by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] as the [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighter]]. dispatched from the [[Ottega system/Legends|Ottega system]]. Learning of that rendezvous spot, [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] Palpatine, stationed on his [[Throneworld/Legends|throneworld]] of [[Byss/Legends|Byss]], fired the Galaxy Gun at the ''Pelagia''. As the particle disintegrator [[Warhead/Legends|warhead]] was traveling toward Tekba's [[Starship/Legends|ship]], it was detected by New Republic long-range [[Sensor/Legends|sensors]]. While the [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]] of [[Color/Legends|Green]] Group were still in the process of docking with the ''Pelagia'', Tekba was contacted by [[General/Legends|General]] [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] of the [[New Republic High Command/Legends|New Republic High Command]]. Calrissian warned Tekba of the approaching [[Missile/Legends|missile]], informing the Mon Calamari of its destructive capabilities and surmising that the ''Pelagia'' only had ten [[Standard minute/Legends|minutes]] to escape. However, Tekba realized that because the ''Pelagia'' would require at least thirty minutes to reach [[Lightspeed/Legends|lightspeed]], it could not be brought to safety in time. As such, Tekba began preparing the ship's forces to take a stand against the warhead. [[File:Destruction_of_Pelagia.jpg|thumb|left|250px|The Galaxy Gun warhead emerges from hyperspace.]] As the missile emerged from hyperspace, Tekba contacted the X-wings of Green Group that were still in [[Realspace/Legends|space]] near the ''Pelagia'', asking them to provide assistance. Tekba launched the ''Pelagia''{{'s}} own [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] complement and sounded a full battle [[Alarm system/Legends|alarm]], bringing all of the troopship's defense [[Cannon/Legends|cannons]] to fire at the warhead. Yet even the combined firepower of the ''Pelagia'' and the X-wings was not enough to penetrate the warhead's [[Deflector shield/Legends|deflector shields]]. Tekba was soon notified of the futility of their attack by [[Green Leader (Destruction of the Pelagia)|Green Leader]] in charge of Green Group. As the missile approached the ''Pelagia'', Tekba desperately attempted to perform evasive maneuvers, but it was to no avail. The warhead exploded on impact with the troopship, [[Destruction of the Pelagia|annihilating the ''Pelagia'']] and [[Death/Legends|killing]] Tekba as well as all those aboard. ===Fallout=== {{Quote|The ''Rebel troopship'' is returned to the ''void!'' The Rebel Alliance will ''know'' their day is over.|Emperor Palpatine, reacting to the death of Captain Tekba and the destruction of the ''Pelagia''|}} [[File:PalpatineNistEE.jpg|thumb|right|250px|The destruction of the ''Pelagia'', as seen by Emperor Palpatine through a probe drone transmission]] In the meantime, Emperor Palpatine, who was watching the attack through a live feed transmitted through [[subminiature probe drone]]s that had followed the missile, was ecstatic at the destruction of the New Republic [[Warship/Legends|warship]]. The Emperor demonstrated the event to the [[Unidentified Gama-Senn ruler|ruler]] of the [[Gama-Senn]] [[Species/Legends|species]], using the fear of the Galaxy Gun to bring the species under his rule. The news of the ''Pelagia''{{'s}} destruction and the loss of Tekba and all the troops aboard was another major blow to the New Republic, whose new base on the [[Nespis VIII|Space City]] of [[Nespis VIII]] soon became the next [[Destruction of the Nespis VIII spaceport|target]] of Palpatine's weapon. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|Battle stations! Tactical, bring all weapons to bear on that missile!|Captain Tekba to the crew of the ''Pelagia''|}} As the commanding [[Officer/Legends|officer]] of the ''Pelagia'', a major New Republic troopship that was capable of ferrying over a hundred thousand troops, Captain Tekba was not particularly impressed with the ship, referring to the vessel as an "old hunk." Ordered by superiors to reinforce the siege of an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] shipyard, the Mon Calamari was intent on completing that mission and was later hesitant to abort docking procedures with the X-wings of Green Group, even after being informed of the incoming Galaxy Gun attack. When faced with the prospect of destruction by the Galaxy Gun, Tekba hastily attempted to organize a defense, giving frantic orders to the crew of the ''Pelagia'', but was unable to stop Palpatine's superweapon. Tekba had black [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] and dark skin. ==Equipment== Before the ''Pelagia'' was destroyed, Tekba wore a [[Mon Cal uniform jerkin|uniform jerkin]], with a [[Pistol/Legends|sidearm]] secured inside a [[Holster/Legends|holster]] at the [[Belt/Legends|belt]]. ==Behind the scenes== Tekba first appeared in the [[Dark Horse Comics|Dark Horse]] [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] [[Empire's End 1|''Empire's End'' 1]], which was written by [[Tom Veitch]], illustrated by [[Jim Baikie]] and released on [[October 24]], [[1995]].{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/54211/star_wars_empires_end_1995_1|text=Star Wars: Empire's End (1995) #1}} Tekba later appeared in the [[Empire's End (audio drama)|audio drama adaptation]] of the comic book released on [[October 17]] of the same year.{{Amazon|url=Star-Wars-Dark-Empire-Collectors/dp/B000008PX5|text=Star Wars: Dark Empire Collector's Edition}} The appearance presented a minor inconsistency, as Tekba was contacted by [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]], instead of Lando Calrissian, who performed the task in the comic. ''Empire's End'' 1 suggested that the destruction of the ''Pelagia'' took place in the Ottega system, in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]. However, ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'', published in [[2009]], placed the event on the Braxant Run in the Outer Rim Territories,''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' in an area later identified as the Weneen sector.{{EmailCite|email=File:EAOC discussion 2023 3.jpg|creator=[[Jason Fry]]|date=2023-04-12}} ==Appearances== *[[Empire's End (audio drama)|''Empire's End'' audio drama]] *[[Empire's End 1|''Empire's End'' 1]] {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[Ultimate Alien Anthology]]'' *{{CSWECite|II||''Pelagia''}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Tekba#legends |pl=Tekba }} [[Category:Individuals with unspecified pronouns]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Mon Calamari]] [[Category:New Republic Defense Fleet captains]]
